name: Kun Peng International Ltd.
business: Kun Peng International Ltd. sells preventive health care products and services through its mobile social e-commerce platform King Eagle Mall, online platform Kun Zhi Jian, and Kun Zhi Jian Mini Program. Its products include dietary supplements, nutritional health foods, beauty cosmeceuticals, and physiotherapy equipment. The company also provides health screening and consulting services through customer service centers.

exposures.sentence: King Eagle Mall is a mobile social e-commerce platform launched in July 2020 that promotes preventive health care products and services.

We coordinate with local health service providers and leverage their health care expertise and technology to provide health screening and consulting services to our customers and members at the Kun Zhi Jian customer service center.
Currently, we promote and sell physiotherapy equipment products and our own brand, as well as other popular brands, of preventive health care related products.

Our major products include health care products such as dietary supplements, nutritional health foods, beauty cosmeceuticals, and other categories of health foods (for instance, milk powder, dried fruits) for supporting the cardiovascular system and bone joint health.
